Quick & simple
setup

It won’t take you long to get the service going. We made a minimum of settings for you to start growing sales within 10 minutes after signup.

Hands-free
repricing

M2E Repricer adjusts prices 24/7 without much effort on your part. The service automatically fluctuates your prices within the set limits, giving you a better chance of winning a sale.

Expert help
at hand

M2E Repricer's friendly interface and simple logic make it intuitive to handle. Still, our proactive and knowledgeable Support Team is always near to cover your back.

Reprice in
M2E Pro

Get your Magento and Amazon sales to a higher level by integrating Amazon Repricer with M2E Pro.

Reprice in
M2E Cloud

Leverage the service with Sales Channels to maximize your profitability on Shopify and other supported e-platforms.

Import inventory with ease

Add new Amazon products to the service and edit existing ones in a couple of clicks. Simply upload a CSV file with all your product details – M2E Amazon Repricer will automatically transfer the necessary data.

Boost your Amazon sales
with M2E Amazon Repricer

Capture more Buy Boxes

Sellers who get placed in the Buy Box sell 83% more often. M2E Amazon Repricer considers various factors of the Amazon algorithm, making your products more likely to own the Buy Box.

Beat your competitors

The service is quick to react even to minor price changes. It monitors your competitors' prices and instantly adjusts to the conditions in the marketplace to mantain your profits high.

Apply flexible strategies

Our solution lets you reprice in your way. It includes built-in repricing strategies to reach your sales goal. Set rules on how you want to compete and keep your priorities in mind – once the goal is achieved, the service automatically moves on to the next one.

Monitor your success

Making decisions based on analytics is a key to improving your sales. Use the interactive dashboard to get a summary of your performance, check repricing results, and keep an eye on competitors.

Reprice without limits

No matter how extensive your inventory is, our repricing software doesn’t limit you by size. Start small or play big, we present boundless opportunities for uploading products in bulk and handling them just in a few clicks. Amazon FBA our Repricer also covers.

Use case

The problem

Can I save time on manual price adjustments on Amazon?

The solution

With M2E Amazon Repricer, you can automate price modification process. Your only task is to pick a needed repricing goal and tailor it to your needs. After that, M2E Repricer starts auto-tweaking prices based on various factors, including competitor prices, saving you time spent on manual price configurations.

The problem

How to win Amazon Buy Box despite the high competition?

The solution

M2E Amazon Repricer offers a “Become a Buy Box winner” repricing goal that you can set up to bring items closer to winning the sought-after award. The app’s interactive dashboard will show you items that don’t have a Buy Box or haven’t reached their goals yet, so you can configure more competitive repricing rules for them.
